title: Tea Sugar and Coffee Canisters set 1L Vintage Kitchen Canister Set tea coffee sugar 3 Piece of Metal Canister Storage Jar Container Set With Airtight Bamboo Lid (Square white)
features: 【QUALITY MATERIALS】Our coffee tea sugar container is made of premium metal and bamboo lid, and it is equipped with a wooden spoon. It is safe, non-toxic, environmentally friendly, lightweight and suitable for home use.

【GOOD STORAGE】The lid of the coffee sugar tea containers is made of high-quality bamboo and perfectly fits the can. A good storage environment for tea and coffee jars ensures that dry goods can be stored for a long time to avoid moisture and mold. ﻿

﻿ 【WITH NAME MARKER & STACKABLE】The tea sugar and coffee containers set, marked with COFFEE, TEA and SUGAR, ensuring easy identification and organization of your coffee, tea and sugar. Tea Canisters The size of the storage containers with lid airtight 14.5 x 8.5 x 8.5 cm, the spoon size is 10.5 x 2.5 cm. Three tin boxes can be stacked inside each other to save space.

【MULTI PURPOSE】In addition to coffee, tea and sugar, this storage canister can also store flour, grains or snacks, etc. providing a versatile storage solution for your kitchen. Coffee Canisters in addition to the basic function of storing food, can also be given as a gift to family or friends who like to collect coffee and tea. ﻿
﻿【CARE INSTRUCTION】This Sugar Canisters set is easy to wipe clean. Do not put in the dishwasher. These are hand wash only. Wipe with a clean warm damp cloth and dry immediately.
description: 【Space Saving & Multipurpose Canisters】 - A fabulously unique way of storing your sugar, coffee & tea. 【Eye-catching Design】 - Clearly labeled in bold & elegant font, sugar coffee tea storage set,keeping your kitchen organized and saving time when preparing your cuppa, while the wooden bamboo lid & embossed patterning looks beautiful when placed on your Kitchen shelf. 【MULTI PURPOSE】 - Kitchen canisters tea coffee sugar can be used to store food that needs to be stored in a dry environment, such as coffee, sugar, tea, nuts, flour, and spices. Tea coffee sugar canisters stackable can also be used to store office supplies and handicrafts. 【Product Details 】 - The size of the storage containers with lid airtight 14.5 x 8.5 x 8.5 cm, the spoon size is 10.5 x 2.5 cm. Three tin boxes can be stacked inside each other to save space. 【Care Instruction】 - This canister set is easy to wipe clean. Do not put in the dishwasher. These are hand wash only. Wipe with a clean warm damp cloth and dry immediately.
